requirement_topic.en: Moroccan Local Importer / Agent Requirement and Bilingual Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 摩洛哥当地进口商/代理商要求及双语标注义务
requirement_topic.zht: 摩洛哥當地進口商/代理商要求及雙語標注義務

summary.en: A Moroccan-registered company must act as local importer or authorised representative for wireless and telecom terminal equipment sold in Morocco. The importer is responsible for ensuring ANRT homologation is obtained before placing devices on the market and for customs clearance. Product labelling must be in both Arabic and French; English-only labelling is not sufficient for Moroccan retail. The ANRT homologation number must appear on the label alongside the importer's name and address.
summary.zh: 在摩洛哥销售的无线电及电信终端设备，须有摩洛哥注册公司担任当地进口商或授权代表。进口商负责确保在设备上市前取得ANRT型式核准并完成海关清关。产品标注须同时使用阿拉伯语和法语；仅有英语标注不满足摩洛哥零售要求。标签上须同时标注ANRT型式核准号以及进口商名称和地址。
summary.zht: 在摩洛哥銷售的無線電及電信終端裝置，須有摩洛哥註冊公司擔任當地進口商或授權代表。進口商負責確保在裝置上市前取得ANRT型式核准並完成海關清關。產品標注須同時使用阿拉伯語和法語；僅有英語標注不滿足摩洛哥零售要求。標籤上須同時標注ANRT型式核准號以及進口商名稱和地址。

standards_or_laws: Loi 24-96 relative à la poste et aux télécommunications (Morocco) — importer obligations
ANRT homologation conditions — importer / authorised representative named on certificate
Moroccan consumer labelling law — Arabic and French bilingual requirement
Morocco Customs (ADII) — Agence des Douanes et Impôts Indirects — import documentation

summary.en: China does not require a domestic-registered importer for products sold domestically — the manufacturer typically holds the CCC and is responsible for compliance. For export, Chinese manufacturers interact with overseas importers. There is no direct Chinese domestic equivalent to the Moroccan local importer / authorised representative requirement; Chinese product labelling for the domestic market uses Simplified Chinese only.
summary.zh: 中国不要求国内销售产品设立境内注册进口商——制造商通常持有CCC认证并对合规性负责。出口时，中国制造商与海外进口商对接。中国国内市场没有与摩洛哥当地进口商/授权代表要求直接对应的制度；中国国内市场产品标注仅使用简体中文。
summary.zht: 中國不要求國內銷售產品設立境內註冊進口商——製造商通常持有CCC認證並對合規性負責。出口時，中國製造商與海外進口商對接。中國國內市場沒有與摩洛哥當地進口商/授權代表要求直接對應的制度；中國國內市場產品標注僅使用簡體中文。

standards_or_laws: CCC holder = manufacturer or authorised applicant (no separate importer registration required for domestic Chinese market)
Chinese product labelling standard GB 7718 (food labelling) — not directly applicable; electronics follow CCC/product-specific rules in Simplified Chinese
No direct equivalent to Moroccan bilingual Arabic/French labelling obligation

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting to Morocco must appoint a Moroccan-registered company as local importer or authorised representative. This entity's details must appear on the product label alongside the ANRT homologation number. Product labels must be in Arabic and French — Simplified Chinese labelling is not accepted and English-only labelling is insufficient. This requires new label artwork for the Moroccan market.
gap.zh: 中国制造商出口至摩洛哥须指定一家摩洛哥注册公司作为当地进口商或授权代表。该实体信息须与ANRT型式核准号一同标注于产品标签。产品标签须使用阿拉伯语和法语——简体中文标注不被接受，仅有英语标注亦不充分。这需要专门为摩洛哥市场重新制作标签。
gap.zht: 中國製造商出口至摩洛哥須指定一家摩洛哥註冊公司作為當地進口商或授權代表。該實體資訊須與ANRT型式核准號一同標注於產品標籤。產品標籤須使用阿拉伯語和法語——簡體中文標注不被接受，僅有英語標注亦不充分。這需要專門為摩洛哥市場重新製作標籤。

source.publisher: ANRT — Agence Nationale de Réglementation des Télécommunications (Morocco)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Moroccan-registered local importer or authorised representative is required. Product labels must be in Arabic and French with the ANRT homologation number and importer details. Chinese or English-only labelling does not satisfy Moroccan retail and import requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 须有摩洛哥注册的当地进口商或授权代表。产品标签须以阿拉伯语和法语标注，并包含ANRT型式核准号及进口商信息。仅有中文或英文标注不满足摩洛哥零售及进口要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 須有摩洛哥註冊的當地進口商或授權代表。產品標籤須以阿拉伯語和法語標注，並包含ANRT型式核准號及進口商資訊。僅有中文或英文標注不滿足摩洛哥零售及進口要求。
